# Roadmap Deferral Register Template

Use this template for per-version deferral snapshots (for example, `docs/v2.0/phase4/f21-deferral-register.md`).

## Rules
- Every deferred item must include rationale, owner role, and revisit target.
- Deferred items cannot appear in in-scope implementation tasks for the same version.

## Deferral table

| DeferralID | Feature | Deferred from version | Rationale | Owner role | Revisit target version | Revisit trigger | Tracking link |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| DEF-vNN-001 | <feature> | vNN | <why deferred> | <role> | vNN+ | <condition> | <doc/path> |
